task: Initialize monorepo foundation and local tooling
acceptance_criteria: apps/, packages/, root toolchain, local scripts, and baseline quality gates are in place
validation_command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy apps
notes: Established root pnpm + uv toolchain, compose baseline, workspace placeholders, and passing L0 gates

task: Implement auth session and RBAC backend
acceptance_criteria: Login, logout, me, session persistence, RBAC checks, and audit hooks work through FastAPI
notes: Implemented FastAPI auth/session/RBAC boundary with audit hooks and passing auth/rbac suites

task: Implement MySQL asset onboarding and control-plane APIs
acceptance_criteria: Admins can create, validate, list, and inspect MySQL instances plus manage core system settings
notes: Implemented control-plane asset/settings services, explicit PostgreSQL repository adapter, and passing API/integration suites

task: Implement scheduler and agentless MySQL metrics pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Scheduler dispatches jobs, Redis carries work, worker collects core metrics, and normalized writes land in ClickHouse
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/scheduler tests/worker_mysql tests/integration/metrics_pipeline && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-metrics-pipeline-live.ps1
notes: Implemented shared pipeline package, Redis queue, ClickHouse sink, explicit DateTime64 fix, and passing live pipeline gate

task: Implement analytics and dashboard query APIs
acceptance_criteria: Overview and instance trend APIs return chart-ready data with stable OpenAPI schemas
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/api/analytics tests/integration/analytics_queries && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-analytics-clickhouse.ps1
notes: Implemented analytics module, chart-ready routes, and passing ClickHouse read-side live gate

completed_at: Basic rules evaluate normalized metrics, persist alert lifecycle, and send notifications via explicit notifier boundaries
retry_count: uv run pytest tests/rule_engine tests/notifier tests/integration/alert_pipeline && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-alert-pipeline-postgres.ps1
column13: Implemented alerting module, explicit notifier boundary, and passing PostgreSQL alert pipeline gate

completed_at: Next.js shell, protected routes, generated API client, query providers, and shared UI primitives work locally
retry_count: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter web test && pnpm --filter web build
column13: Implemented Next shell, typed client/query layer, shared primitives, and passing next build

acceptance_criteria: Users can complete onboarding, dashboard, instance detail, alerts, rules, and settings flows in the web app
notes: Implemented authenticated monitoring pages, server actions, and ECharts-backed trend views with passing web gates

task: Implement final contract and quality gates
acceptance_criteria: Root-level contract, integration, and smoke gates pass and can be used as release signoff
validation_command: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy apps && uv run pytest tests && pnpm openapi:check && pnpm smoke
notes: Implemented root OpenAPI snapshot checks, integration aggregate, and production-mode Playwright smoke flow with passing final signoff command
